scripts.typecheck:matrix: pnpm run typecheck:tenant && pnpm run typecheck:mit && pnpm run typecheck:fastmap
scripts.test:drupal: command -v ddev >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[test:drupal] Skipped (ddev not available, run from host)'; exit 0; }; ddev exec "cd web && SIMPLETEST_BASE_URL=http://localhost SIMPLETEST_DB=mysql://db:db@db/db ../vendor/bin/phpunit --bootstrap core/tests/bootstrap.php profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_ai/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_bbox_cache/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_cap/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_confirm/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_contact/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_dashboard/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_emergency/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_escalation/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_facility/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_fastmap/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_geocoder/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_group/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_health/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_mail/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_mail_inbound/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_nuxt/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_open311/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_open311/tests/src/Kernel/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_passwordless/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_resubmission/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_service_provider/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_sso/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_tenant_admin/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_ui/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_validation/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/modules/markaspot_vision/tests/src/Unit/ profiles/contrib/markaspot/tests/src/Unit/"
scripts.test:integration: command -v ddev >/dev/null 2>&1 && { ddev drush php:script web/profiles/contrib/markaspot/tests/test-endpoints.php; r1=$?; ddev drush php:script web/profiles/contrib/markaspot/tests/test-multi-tenant.php; r2=$?; [ $r1 -eq 0 ] && [ $r2 -eq 0 ]; } || echo '[test:integration] Skipped (ddev not available, run from host)'
scripts.test:all: pnpm run lint && pnpm run i18n:check:strict && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:drupal && pnpm run test:integration
